title: Short title
doc_html:
PART III. EMERGENCY MEDICAL SERVICES

FOR CHILDREN PROGRAM

§1075.1. Short title

            This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Emergency Medical Services for Children Program".

            Acts 1995, No. 1306, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1300.101 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
doc_text:
PART III.  EMERGENCY MEDICAL SERVICES
FOR CHILDREN PROGRAM
§1075.1.  Short title
This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Emergency Medical Services for
Children Program".
Acts 1995, No. 1306, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1300.101 by HCR 84 of 2015
